introSection: Chase's Mountain Mission is a steel roller coaster manufactured by German firm Zierer currently under construction at Chessington World of Adventures in Chessington, Greater London, England, UK. The ride will be themed after the cartoon PAW Patrol.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Track arrived by October 2025.

The coaster's name was officially revealed with the rest of the World of Paw Patrol area on 3 February 2026, and will open in the spring.

fullText:
Chase's Mountain Mission is a steel roller coaster manufactured by German firm Zierer currently under construction at Chessington World of Adventures in Chessington, Greater London, England, UK. The ride will be themed after the cartoon PAW Patrol.

Track arrived by October 2025.

The coaster's name was officially revealed with the rest of the World of Paw Patrol area on 3 February 2026, and will open in the spring.
